title: oenothera cespitosa subsp. australis
intro: Oenothera cespitosa subsp. australis, also known as the Australian evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant within the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The Australian evening primrose has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, and is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and providing antioxidant properties. The Australian evening primrose can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are traditionally used to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
